---
title: 'Anger'
date: '2018-01-07T19:22:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2458162854519800077'
blogger_filename: '/2018/01/anger.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

One Place: Bomb

Sunday, January 7, 2018
11:19 AM

Locate your anger.

What upsets you the most?

When are the last times you exploded? What happened? Why did you get angry? What's the primary emotion underneath? What did you leap frog into anger?

What's the most common reason you get angry?

Ephesians 4

The cross of Christ is about the anger of God.
